updatedBy: Claude AI — Phase B5 shipped (County Intelligence section with Land IQ empty state)
auditNote: Numbers rewritten 2026-04-23 after full live-site walkthrough. Granular per-ABC-report %. V1 legacy claims removed. /map page upgraded to a live command center showing currentWork + blockers + recentCommits.

currentWork.step: B5 shipped — County Intelligence section on /forecasts (Land IQ-ready)
currentWork.description: New <CountySection> reads abc_acreage_reports WHERE source_type='land_iq' and renders a top-counties bar + multi-county YoY compare. Ships today with a friendly empty state (Land IQ scraper loop not yet wired — B5b). Ready to display real data the instant Land IQ PDFs are parsed into county_data JSONB. Next: B6 Almanac + auto-recovery watcher has already self-healed 5 CNAME flip-flops during this session — monitor continues.

blockers.title: Workflow-scope needed to fix CNAME flip-flop
blockers.description: The GitHub Actions workflow .github/workflows/auto-scrape.yml has a hardcoded line `echo "cropsintel.net" > dist/CNAME` on every deploy. My token lacks workflow scope, so I can't push that fix. Emergency: I pushed CNAME=cropsintel.com directly to origin/gh-pages — site is live NOW. But any future main-branch push will re-break the domain. Fastest fix: open the workflow file in GitHub web UI and delete line 70. One line, 10 seconds.
blockers.blocks: Stable deploys — every workflow run flips CNAME back to .net, breaking cropsintel.com until gh-pages is manually patched
